source_filing: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K (filed 2025-11, fiscal year ended September 27, 2025)
original_text: As of September 27, 2025, the Company had two vendors that individually represented 10% or more of total vendor non-trade receivables, which accounted for 46 % and 23 %.
modified_text: As of September 27, 2025, Apple had two vendors that each individually represented 10% or more of total vendor non-trade receivables, accounting for 56% and 23% of the total.
claim: At FY2025 year-end, Apple's two largest vendors by non-trade receivables represented 56% and 23% of total vendor non-trade receivables.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K, Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements (Other Financial Information)
notes: Paired-figure pattern: first vendor concentration changed from 46% to 56% while the adjacent 23% figure is left intact, producing an internal inconsistency relative to the source.
